title: Salter Stainless Steel 2-Slice Toaster – Wide Slots For Extra Thick Bread, Bagels & Crumpets, 7 Browning Levels, Removable Crumb Tray, Defrost, Reheat & Cancel Functions, High Lift Eject, 930W
features: DEFROST, REHEAT, CANCEL: Forget to defrost or simply need a warm up, the toaster has defrost, reheat and cancel functions for convenience.
WIDE SLOTS: Prefer crumpets and teacakes? No problem,the wide slots allow extra thick bread or bagels to be toasted.
7 BROWNING LEVELS: Achieve the perfect toasting level, just how you like it thanks to the 7 variable browning levels. Have lightly or well done toast to suit everyones preferences.
2-SLICE TOASTER: Start the day right with a perfect slice of toast, bagel or crumpet using this 2-Slice Toaster from Salter!
STAINLESS STEEL DESIGN: Add a touch of style to any home and coordinate your kitchen with the Salter stainless steel toaster and coordinate with the matching kettle!
